---
title: "Ark Survival Evolved Overview"
format: pptx
---

## Ark: Survival Evolved

- An Overview

## Gameplay Mechanics

- Open‑world survival with dynamic ecosystems
- Tame and ride dinosaurs and other creatures
- Base building, resource gathering, and crafting
- Multiplayer co‑op and PvP modes
- Seasonal updates and expansions

## Cultural Impact

- Influential in the survival genre
- Large online community and modding scene
- Esports and streaming popularity
- Cross‑platform releases broadened audience
- Legacy in gaming culture and media
